headline: Is CoStar Group (CSGP) Starting To Look Attractive After A 52% Share Price Decline?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether CoStar Group at around US$38.77 is starting to look like value, or if the stock still has more downside risk priced in. The share price shows a 1.4% decline over the last 7 days, a 9.6% decline over 30 days, a 41.0% decline year to date, and a 52.6% decline over the past year. These moves may catch the eye of investors looking for potential opportunities or reassessing risk. Recent commentary around CoStar Group has focused on its role in real estate data...
